agent: speckit.plan

# MealCraft Implementation Plan

## Phase 1 - Project Setup

- Create Next.js application
- Configure TypeScript
- Configure Tailwind CSS
- Configure MongoDB connection
- Configure authentication

Deliverable:
Working application scaffold

---

## Phase 2 - Authentication

Features:

- Register
- Login
- Logout
- Protected routes

Deliverable:
Authenticated users can access their profile.

---

## Phase 3 - Recipe Management

Pages:

- Recipe List
- Recipe Detail
- Create Recipe
- Edit Recipe

Deliverable:
Full recipe CRUD functionality.

---

## Phase 4 - Shopping Lists

Features:

- Select recipes
- Generate shopping list

Deliverable:
Shopping list generation from stored recipes.

---

## Phase 5 - Profile Management

Features:

- View profile
- Update profile

Deliverable:
User profile management.

---

## Phase 6 - Testing and Deployment

- Unit testing
- Integration testing
- Bug fixes
- Vercel deployment

Deliverable:
Production-ready application
---
